## Extracted Preview
> RUH.AI
> V1 System Design & MVP Execution Blueprint
> Digital employee operating system built on top of OpenClaw gateway runtimes
> Document type
> System design document (SDD)
> Primary goal
> Define the V1 architecture, build scope, and implementation sequence that turns the PRD into an executable platform
> Status
> Working draft for product, engineering, and design-partner discussions
> 
> Why this document exists
> The PRD defined the platform ambition. This document narrows the build to the minimum system that can reliably create digital employees, let them collaborate through governed workflows, and run them in trust-bounded OpenClaw runtimes.
> 
> Executive snapshot
> Decision area
> V1 choice
> Architecture shape
> Shared Ruh.ai control plane + dedicated runtime plane per customer trust boundary
> Primary runtime
> OpenClaw gateway handles agents, workspaces, sessions, routing, tools, skills, hooks, and cron [R1]-[R6]
> Primary Ruh.ai value
> Template registry, deployment compiler, task graph orchestration, approvals, secrets brokerage, evals, and analytics
> Default collaboration model
> Typed tasks + artifacts + approval states. Direct agent-to-agent chat is not the default enterprise path [R7]
> V1 build target
> Create employees from templates, assign work across employees, gate risky actions, and push auditable results into systems of record
> 
> 1. Purpose of this document
> This system design document converts the platform PRD into an implementation blueprint for Ruh.ai V1. It defines the system boundary, runtime model, core services, collaboration contract between digital employees, security posture, and phas...
